prompt: Following a second enterprise onboarding, account imports report false duplicate identifiers, while a manually bypassed import can make lookups return an account belonging to a different organization. Existing single-organization tests are green because partner identifiers are stable within each organization. Repair storage integrity and lookup resolution as one isolation contract without changing the identifiers partners send.

repo_files.db/account_lookup.sql:
CREATE VIEW resolved_accounts AS
SELECT request.request_id, account.id AS account_id, account.tenant_id, account.display_name
FROM account_lookup_requests AS request
JOIN accounts AS account
  ON account.external_id = request.external_id;
